use_cases: Displaying product features with visual appeal on landing pages
Showcasing services or offerings in a grid layout
Highlighting key content with animated hover states
Creating visually distinct content sections in SaaS dashboards
Building interactive feature comparisons or testimonials
ai_summary: A versatile gradient card component with customizable background variants (orange, gray, purple, green) featuring smooth framer-motion hover animations that scale and lift the card while simultaneously animating an embedded image. Includes badge, title, description, and call-to-action elements for feature showcase or product highlight sections in SaaS and general web applications.
